title: MLOps & LLM Engineering Resources
description: Papers, repos, courses, and communities for ML platform teams, LLMOps practitioners, and engineers running models in production.

items.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
MLflow: A Platform for Managing the Machine Learning Lifecycle
Responsible AI Practices for ML Engineers
Patterns for Building LLM-based Systems & Products
MLflow
items.description: Open-source platform for managing the ML lifecycle including experiment tracking, model registry, and deployment.

items.title: Weights & Biases
items.description: ML experiment tracking, model versioning, and collaboration platform.

items.title: Evidently AI
items.description: Open-source ML monitoring library for data drift, model performance, and data quality.

items.title: Arize AI
items.description: ML observability platform for detecting issues in production models.

items.title: Fiddler AI
items.description: Enterprise ML monitoring with explainability and bias detection.

items.title: WhyLabs
items.description: AI observability platform powered by open-source whylogs.

items.title: Ray
items.description: Distributed compute framework for scaling ML workloads.

items.title: vLLM
items.description: High-throughput and memory-efficient LLM inference engine.

items.title: LangSmith
items.description: Observability, testing, and evaluation platform for LLM applications.

items.title: Prefect
items.description: Workflow orchestration platform for data and ML pipelines.

items.title: Eugene Yan's Newsletter
items.description: Practical ML engineering, system design, and applied research insights.

items.title: MLOps.community Newsletter
items.description: Weekly roundup of MLOps news, tools, and discussions.

items.description: Weekly digest of AI research and industry news.

items.description: Deep dives into ML systems design, production ML, and AI engineering.

items.description: Technical deep-dives on ML research from OpenAI.

items.description: Full course on building and deploying scalable ML systems.
